scripts.dev: concurrently --names backend,frontend,monitoring "cd backend && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000" "pnpm --filter frontend dev" "cd monitoring && docker compose up -d"
scripts.test: cd backend && python -m pytest && cd .. && pnpm --filter frontend test
scripts.install:all: cd backend && pip install -r requirements-dev.txt && cd .. && pnpm install
